claim: Three-confirmation provenance: bridge sessions T2B-BIPARTITION-B6-VERIFICATION (commit 1735258), T2B-BIPARTITION-B7-STRONG-NULL (commit 8e18465), and U1-MOBIUS-LOCAL-CHECK (commit 171eccc) verified present on origin/main of github.com/papanokechi/siarc-relay-bridge as of 2026-05-07. b1=5 baseline cited via T2B-DELTA2-VERIFICATION + T2B-PLUS-QUARTER-SURVEY (sessions/2026-04-29/) per v3.0 Acknowledgements.

Class A b1=6 family list at a2=-8 (ratio -2/9): three Trans hits (-8,4,0,6,2)->4/pi, (-8,4,0,6,4)->4/(pi-2), (-8,-4,4,6,4)->(8*pi+2*pi^2)/(2*pi+pi^2); deep-verified at dps=300, N=1500; PSLQ residuals 0.0 (first and third) and ~1.5e-300 (second). Source: bridge session T2B-BIPARTITION-B6-VERIFICATION handoff.md, claims C2/C6/C7.

Class B b1=6 family at a2=9 (ratio +1/4): one Trans hit (9,0,0,6,3)->12/pi; deep-verified at dps=300 N=1500 with relation [12,0,0,-1,0,0,0,0] and residual 0.0. Sign-flip orbit completeness verified: singleton-mate (9,0,0,-6,-3)->-12/pi at dps=300 N=1500, relation [-12,0,0,-1,0,0,0,0], residual 0.0. Source: T2B-BIPARTITION-B6-VERIFICATION handoff.md claims C3/C4.

b1=7 strong-null verdict: 0 Trans hits in 79,860 candidates at b1=7, a2 in [-30,30]\{0}, free (a1,a0,b0) in [-5,5]^3. Pre-registered binary outcome resolves consistent with bipartition-only-loci claim: 9 nmid 49 AND 4 nmid 49 force predicted Trans count = 0. Wall-time 1855s on 7-worker pool. Source: T2B-BIPARTITION-B7-STRONG-NULL handoff.md, identity_partition_table.json, claims.jsonl.

Log-stratum off-locus pattern (TWO data points; OPEN STRUCTURAL QUESTION; not a third class): (i) at b1=6, family (-1,0,0,6,3) ratio -1/36 -> L=2/log(2), in Bauer 1872 orbit (already characterised in v3.0 Remark rem:bauer-orbit); (ii) at b1=7, family (8,-4,0,7,4) ratio 8/49 -> L=3/log(2), outside Bauer 1872 orbit (a2=+8 not -k^2) and outside both bipartition loci. Synth-recommended framing 2026-05-05 ~18:45 JST: open structural question, not third class.

U1 Mobius-equivalence local check at b1=6: classical sequence-rescaling between PCF A=(-1,0,0,6,3) and PCF B=(-8,0,0,6,4) FAILS. Required r_n*r_{n-1}=8; observed sequence with r_n=(6n+4)/(6n+3) yields {1.481, 1.185, 1.117, 1.086, 1.068} for n=1..5, none equals 8. Bauer-Muir with constant w also fails. Verdict: LIMIT-LEVEL equivalence only (both PCFs converge to L=b(0)+K=2/log(2) at dps=200 N=4000 with |L_A-L_B|=0). Structural finding K_A - K_B = +1 EXACTLY (b(0) shift compensates K shift). Source: U1-MOBIUS-LOCAL-CHECK handoff.md.
